nasb.text: With a strong hand and an outstretched arm, For His lovingkindness is everlasting.

esv.text: with a strong hand and an outstretched arm, for his steadfast love endures forever;

cnv.text: 他用大能的手和伸出來的膀臂領他們出來， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

ccb.text: 祂伸出臂膀施展大能， 因为祂的慈爱永远长存。

csbs.text: 就是用他大能的手和伸出来的膀臂， 因他的慈爱永远长存！
